what_it_does: Exports a single constant VERSION set to "1.4.2" and includes a comment stating the file is generated by scripts/generate-version.js from package.json and should not be edited by hand.
observations: Top comment says the file is generated and warns against hand edits
Contains no imports, functions, classes, or types
File sits under recollection/src, suggesting it is the package's version module
The generator source is referenced as scripts/generate-version.js
standouts: Self-described as a generated, non-hand-editable artifact
conventions: Named export of an UPPER_CASE constant
Version value uses a semver-like three-part numeric string
concerns: Version may become stale if the generator is not rerun after package.json changes
No runtime check that the exported value matches package.json
notes: A generated, read-only version token meant to be imported by other parts of the package.
questions: How and when is scripts/generate-version.js executed?
Which modules consume VERSION and for what purpose?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file says it exports a generated VERSION constant derived from package.json, and it does export VERSION.
apparent_themes: Single source of truth for package version
Generated artifacts preferred over hand-maintained values
intention_signals: Provide a stable, importable version identifier that stays synchronized with package.json without requiring manual edits to this file.
contribution: Supplies a canonical, importable VERSION constant that other modules can reference for diagnostics, headers, or feature-gating.
summary_for_embedding: company/recollection/src/version.ts is a generated module that exports the package version constant "1.4.2" and instructs editors to update package.json and rebuild rather than edit the file directly.
intention_for_embedding: To expose the current package version as a stable, importable constant derived from package.json.
